Hero.description: Create private rooms, invite friends, and enjoy classic games online.

Games.title: Pick your board.
Games.description: Four classic games, one polished arena. More on the way.

chess.name: Chess
chess.description: The original game of kings, rebuilt for quick rematches.

checkers.name: Checkers
checkers.description: Simple rules, sharp tactics. Jump your way to the last piece standing.

connect-4.name: Connect 4
connect-4.description: Four in a row wins it. Easy to learn, hard to see coming.

tic-tac-toe.name: Tic Tac Toe
tic-tac-toe.description: The fastest rematch in the lineup. Best of three or best of ten, your call.

HowItWorks.title: Three steps to your first match.

steps.title: Create Room
steps.description: Spin up a private room in one tap. No setup, no waiting.

steps.title: Invite Friend
steps.description: Send a link. Whoever opens it is in the room.

steps.title: Start Playing
steps.description: Pick a game and go. The board does the rest.

Features.title: Built for the way you actually play.

items.title: Realtime Gameplay
items.description: Every move lands instantly. No refresh, no lag.

items.title: Private Rooms
items.description: Your matches stay between you and whoever you invite.

items.title: Cross Platform
items.description: Play from a phone, tablet, or desktop without missing a move.

items.title: Multilingual
items.description: Full support for English and Arabic, down to the layout direction.

items.question: What is Arena?
items.answer: Arena is a place to play classic board games online with friends, in private rooms built for quick rematches.

items.question: How do I play with friends?
items.answer: Create a private room and share the invite link. Whoever opens it joins the room right away.

items.question: Which games will be available?
items.answer: Chess, Checkers, Connect 4, and Tic Tac Toe are first up, with more classics planned after launch.

items.question: Will mobile devices be supported?
items.answer: Yes. Arena is built as one responsive interface that works on phones, tablets, and desktops.

RoomsPage.title: Your rooms
RoomsPage.description: Every room you host or have joined, in one place.
RoomsPage.emptyState: No rooms yet. Create one or join with an invite code.

RoomDetailPage.title: Room
RoomDetailPage.inviteHint: Share this code with friends to invite them.
RoomDetailPage.startSessionHint: Waiting for enough players to be ready.

GameDetailPage.title: This match isn't wired up yet.
GameDetailPage.description: The board, moves, and live state will render here once a game engine is implemented on top of the architecture in src/features/games.

Footer.tagline: Classic games, played the modern way.

GamesPage.title: Every game, one arena.
GamesPage.description: Browse what's playable now and what's coming next.

DashboardPage.title: Dashboard
DashboardPage.description: Jump back into a room or start something new.
DashboardPage.emptyState: No rooms yet. Create one or join with an invite code.

LoginPage.title: Welcome back
LoginPage.description: Log in to get back to your rooms.

CreateRoomPage.title: Create a room
CreateRoomPage.description: Pick a name. You'll get an invite code right after.

JoinRoomPage.title: Join a room
JoinRoomPage.description: Enter the 6-character code your friend shared with you.

NotFound.title: This page doesn't exist.
